facebook.caption:
575 reviews. 4.5 stars. And the line outside Pho Sai Gon tells you everything before you even order.

This is the bowl locals come back to. Pho done the Saigon way, deep broth, fresh herbs, the works. Right on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 in Khu 1, Phú Quốc.

Skip the resort restaurant tonight. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch that broth hit the bowl. Pho Sai Gon on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is pulling 4.5 stars across 575 reviews for a reason. This is what a proper Phu Quoc dinner looks like.

instagram.caption:
575 reviews. 4.5 stars. Pho Sai Gon is not the one to skip.

Deep broth. Real pho. Đ. 30 Tháng 4, Khu 1, Phú Quốc. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: 4.5 stars. 575 reviews. One bowl at Pho Sai Gon and you'll get why. Tag your travel buddy.

tiktok.caption: 575 reviews don't lie. Pho Sai Gon on Đ. 30 Tháng 4, Phú Quốc is the real deal. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamFood #TravelTips
